target: Same tune events return to the same follower positions without binding or skipped events
method: start reference; tune reset; barrel runout; follower registration; repeatability after removal
action: Do not promote barrel geometry until repeatability is demonstrated

target: Pins stay secure and serviceable through repeated mule cycles
method: pin insertion method; pullout behavior; wear; follower noise; service replacement
action: Revise pin shape/material or retention method

target: Pallet input receives repeatable motion without follower chatter
method: lift path; return behavior; lost motion; friction; side load
action: Revise follower profile, spring, or contact material

target: Linkage resets reliably and can be adjusted without disassembly
method: motion transfer; backlash; reset; access for adjustment
action: Revise linkage geometry or add access

target: Closed pallets seal and open pallets return without audible or measured leak evidence
method: seat contact; gasket behavior; leak detection; return force; repeated actuation
action: Revise seat material, gasket, or return force

target: Wind delivery remains stable enough for later pipe speech tests
method: crank cadence; reservoir behavior; wind sag under one or more open pallets
action: Add/resize reservoir or revise bellows geometry

target: Channels stay isolated and accessible during mule tests
method: channel isolation; pallet-to-channel mapping; service access; leak paths
action: Revise channel partitioning or gasket layout

target: Pipe samples seat consistently without promoting scale or tuning claims
method: pipe toe seating; removable fit; channel registration; family-specific coupling
action: Revise toe/channel datum before any pipe-scale claim

target: Maintenance tasks can be performed without disturbing unrelated subsystems
method: barrel removal; follower access; pallet access; bellows inspection; pipe protection
action: Add/relocate access panels before enclosing mechanism
